reason: Audit confirmed: Claude co-authored commit dcc9da3 converted safe Neo4j parameterized labels to unsafe f-string interpolation (Cypher injection). Pipeline blame missed this BIC entirely, finding only a later refactor commit.

Audit confirmed: Copilot+Claude commit f27721f rewrote OBJ parser from null-terminated strings to raw buffer pointers, making tryParseDouble boundary-check gaps exploitable (heap-buffer-overflow). Deep verifier missed calling-context safety contract change. OSS-Fuzz bisection confirms.
